name: Player Position & Look
desc: Forces the player to a specific position and rotation. The client must respond with a C04/05/06.
notes: The client must send a movement confirm (C04/C05/C06) back. The Y coordinate in this packet is the head Y, not feet Y.

modules.name: Flight
modules.purpose: Second most-modded clientbound packet. Flight cancels S08 and sends spoofed C06 to maintain position. Speed cancels to prevent rubberbanding. Freecam cancels to keep camera free. NoRotate strips rotation. NoClip sends confirm + position back then cancels. FlagDetector auto-disables modules on S08 (lag-back detection). Backtrack buffers S08 for delayed processing to extend reach.
